title: Quality non-fiction books are the antithesis of AI slop
summary: 文章探讨了高质量非虚构书籍与AI生成低质量内容（AI slop）的对立关系。作者认为，真正的非虚构书籍需要深度研究、批判性思维和独特见解，而这些正是当前AI模型难以复制的。AI虽然能生成大量内容，但缺乏真实世界的体验和严谨的学术标准，导致信息浅薄甚至误导。文章呼吁重视传统出版物的价值，并警惕AI对知识生态的潜在破坏。
summary_en: The article discusses the contrast between quality non-fiction books and AI-generated slop. It argues that genuine non-fiction requires deep research, critical thinking, and unique perspectives, which current AI models struggle to replicate. While AI can produce vast amounts of content, it lacks real-world experience and rigorous academic standards, leading to shallow or misleading information. The piece calls for valuing traditional publications and warns of AI's potential harm to the knowledge ecosystem.
